rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees.
Use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings and assignments.
generic_rules: AGREE annexes must be placed within `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only.
Implementation contracts may include subcomponent bindings when valid in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-specific subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
